text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It's not a big deal... My temples just hurt a little...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Tch. Maybe it was a bit chilly yesterday after I
got out of the bath...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I should have dried my hair right away before the
night air touched it.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Imagine Brian's hair flowing in the night breeze...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ngh?! It's echoing... in my skull...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian's headache continues for a while
after.
